summary: Tested ConciergeButton feature for two-way communication. Backend APIs (GET/POST /api/os/concierge/threads) working correctly. Frontend ConciergeButton visible and functional on /celebrate-new for logged-in users. Header variant in MiraOS Modal working. Pet name display fix verified in DoggyServiceDesk code.

z-index fix to z-[10000] successfully stacks ConciergeButton above MiraChatWidget (z-[9999])
Position is bottom-24 on mobile, bottom-20 on desktop to avoid overlap with Ask Mira FAB
DoggyServiceDesk senderLabel fix (lines 4470-4480) has proper priority chain for pet name resolution
